title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 94.620 - Applicable provisions
text:
94.620.  Applicable provisions. — Except as modified in sections 94.600 to 94.655, all provisions of sections 32.085 and 32.087 shall apply to the tax imposed under sections 94.600 to 94.655.
(L. 1973 H.B. 65 § 5, A.L. 1979 H.B. 726, H.B. 296, A.L. 1991 H.B. 29)
